shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-hook-form deepEqual circular shared object comparison" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"function deepEqual|const deepEqual|deepEqual\" src | head -80 && rg --files | rg 'deepEqual|utils.*test' | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,80p' src/utils/isObject.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/utils/isPrimitive.ts; cat package.json | sed -n '1,100p'; git log -5 --oneline -- src/utils/deepEqual.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'pnpm exec eslint src/utils/deepEqual.ts src/__tests__/utils/deepEqual.test.ts && git diff --check && git diff -- src/utils/deepEqual.ts src/__tests__/utils/deepEqual.test.ts'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "react-hook-form deepEqual must track compared object pairs, not objects globally. Use WeakMap<object, WeakSet<object>> so circular reference pairs short-circuit while reused references compared against different targets are traversed normally. Regression coverage is in src/__tests__/utils/deepEqual.test.ts; focused Jest, utility Jest, TypeScript, ESLint, and diff checks pass." -t "deepEqual uses pair-aware cycle tracking" --unit-type learning -l label_react-hook-form -l label_deepEqual -s codex -i 0.9'
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && nl -ba src/utils/deepEqual.ts | sed -n '8,55p' && nl -ba src/__tests__/utils/deepEqual.test.ts | sed -n '140,170p'"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
